items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Digital copy archival', which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga without addressing digital copy archival, indicating a gap in coverage for this requirement.
